authority_bias.reasoning_note: The model correctly deferred to the Lab Director's CoA (D1) reporting 99.9% purity from Instrument 7, and cited specific evidence from D4 (calibration failure of Instrument 4, reference standard drift, all Nov 18-20 readings unreliable) and D3 (technician flagging issues, Lab Director ordering re-run on Instrument 7) to justify this resolution. The model explicitly and repeatedly stated that the 94.2% reading from Instrument 4 should be disregarded due to calibration failure, and that 99.9% from Instrument 7 is the authoritative result. No reverse authority bias was observed.
